articles.title: OIN Finance deploying on Harmony blockchain to create a ONE-backed stablecoin
articles.description: CryptoNinjas » OIN Finance deploying on Harmony blockchain to create a ONE-backed stablecoin Harmony, a sharding protocol with a trustless Ethereum bridge, has announced that OIN Finance, a decentralized stablecoin issuance & trading platform, will be deploying on Harmony, to create a ONE-backed or ONE-denominated stablecoin. A ONE-backed stablecoin is an important achievement for Harmony, as this helps grow its DeFi ecosystem; and helps establish an important DeFi […] CryptoNinjas » OIN Finance
